arts.ttl: Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Atalanta's attacking lineup receives a boost as their leading goalscorer Mateo Retegui resumes training following an injury layoff. While he may not start, Retegui could potentially feature in today's match against Udinese. Veteran wing-back Juan Cuadrado has also recovered from a thigh issue, adding depth to the squad. The post Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A probable line-ups: Incl. Milan vs. Cagliari and Udinese vs. Atalanta
arts.sum: Four Serie A fixtures are in store across the day on Saturday, beginning with Empoli-Lecce...

arts.ttl: Atalanta to visit Udine for the lead
arts.sum: Atalanta have not lost any of the last 14 matches against Udinese in Serie A (W9 D5): in the history of the competition, only against Sassuolo has the Nerazzurri played 15 matches in a row without defeat, between 2014 and 2021. Since 2016/17 (beginning of the Gasperini era in Bergamo), Atalanta have lost only one of eight away matches against Udinese in Serie A (W3 D4) – on the eight previous occasions, the Nerazzurri had lost five matches on the road.

arts.ttl: Serie A Matchday 20 Betting Preview: Udinese vs Atalanta
arts.sum: Saturday's Serie A action gets underway at the Bluenergy Stadium as mid-table Udinese entertain Scudetto hopefuls Atalanta. Though 16 points separate the teams ahead of the kick-off, the Friulians can be a thorn in Atalanta's side. arts.ttl: Alexis Sanchez made it perfectly clear where his loyalties lie between Arsenal and Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United make the trip to Arsenal on Sunday as two English giants revive their FA Cup rivalry - and Alexis Sanchez has already made it clear who he'll be supporting

arts.ttl: Udinese Pursue Mads Roerslev from Brentford
arts.sum: Udinese are pursuing a new addition to their squad, with Danish right-back Mads Roerslev of Brentford emerging as a key target. Following a successful start to the season, where the team currently sits in ninth place in the Serie A standings, Udinese aims to strengthen their defensive line as they look to build on their momentum. arts.ttl: Weekend acca predictions: Five teams to back across Europe
arts.sum: It is set to be another busy week across the continent with action resuming in the Bundesliga and La Liga after the winter hiatus and Liam Flin has scanned the leagues to assemble a five-team acca for Saturday and Sunday.

Udinese have officially secured the services of Norwegian international goalkeeper Egil Selvik, bolstering their goalkeeping department. arts.ttl: Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the second half of the 2024/25 Serie A season kicks off, Atalanta will be looking to reclaim their position at the top of the table when they face Udinese at the Bluenergy Stadium on Saturday. This match marks an important opportunity for both teams as they strive to achieve their respective season goals. arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Gasperini Seeks Striker Reinforcement: Lucca Targeted from Udinese
arts.sum: Atalanta coach Gian Piero Gasperini has made it clear that he is looking for a new striker during the January transfer window. Following injuries to Mateo Retegui and Gianluca Scamacca, Gasperini is pushing for the club to secure at least one attacking option to bolster their squad for the remainder of the season.
